edgeCases: Raw-preserving read-modify-write keeps unknown fields (legacyDependsOn, customField) on untouched entries
Backlog phase created as last phase when absent; appended-to when present without disturbing prior entries
Validate exemption narrow: real non-Backlog features still require analysis+quality; 'Pre-Backlog Work' not exempt
Promote score validation (range then overall>=9) runs before any write; all rejection paths leave files unchanged
promote without --scores prints evaluator context and writes nothing; unknown phase lists known phases
Emptied Backlog phase kept (not dropped) after promote; renders no section when empty
Source flag auto-resolves from worktree CWD via DetectFeatureFromCwd; omitted entirely at repo root
Fix: promote pre-flights both artifact JSON+MD files before writing roadmap.json; missing/corrupt artifact leaves all five files byte-identical (no half-promoted state)
Fix: appendToPhase refuses a slug already present in the target phase, preventing duplicate entries from hand-edited/merge-artifact roadmaps
Fix: writeArtifact and rawDoc.render emit map-backed non-feature keys in sorted order (sortedKeys) for deterministic, churn-free output
Fix: --scores "" (explicitly empty) is now a usage error via cobra Changed; only an unset --scores enters the evaluator/print-context path
backlog excluded from summary completion counts
